claims.evidence_text: two different N levels of 50%-N50 (T1) and 100%-N100 (T2) of recommended N, i.e., 100 kg/ha.
claims.claim_summary: Recommended nitrogen dose for bread wheat is 100 kg N/ha.

claims.evidence_text: The NUE in T1 ranged from 9.4 to 21.5 kg grain/kg N (Avg: 15.9 kg grain/ kg N) whereas it was with a range of 9.6 to 19.0 kg grain/kg N in T2 (Avg: 15.2 kg grain/kg N)
claims.claim_summary: Nitrogen use efficiency of bread wheat genotypes ranged 9.4-21.5 kg grain/kg N at 50% N (avg 15.9) and 9.6-19.0 at 100% N (avg 15.2).
claims.management_system: field, two N levels (50 and 100 kg N/ha)

claims.evidence_text: It ranged from 71.9 to 113.1 kg N/ha (Avg: 94.6 kg grain/kg N) in T1 and decreased by 18.6% as compared with T2 (N100) where it ranged from 89.0 to 134.8 kg N/ha (Avg: 116.2 kg N/ha).
claims.claim_summary: Total nitrogen uptake of bread wheat ranged 71.9-113.1 kg N/ha at 50% N (avg 94.6) and 89.0-134.8 kg N/ha at 100% N (avg 116.2).

claims.evidence_text: The GPC ranged from 10.9–13.7% (Avg: 12.6%) in T2 as compared to T1 with a range of 10.6 to 13.3% (Avg: 12.1%).
claims.claim_summary: Bread wheat grain protein content ranged 10.6-13.3% (avg 12.1) at 50% N and 10.9-13.7% (avg 12.6) at 100% N.

claims.evidence_text: The results showed a higher mean of 97.3 TPM, 50.1 GPS and 37.0g
claims.claim_summary: Mean thousand grain weight of bread wheat genotypes was about 37.0 g.

claims.evidence_text: The results showed a higher mean of 97.3 TPM, 50.1 GPS and 37.0g
claims.claim_summary: Mean number of grains per spike of bread wheat genotypes was 50.1.

claims.evidence_text: The results showed a higher mean of 97.3 TPM, 50.1 GPS and 37.0g
claims.claim_summary: Mean number of productive tillers per meter row length of bread wheat was 97.3.

claims.evidence_text: Interestingly, 1.3% lower HI was observed in T2 (31.5%) as compared to T1 (31.9%) con dition.
claims.claim_summary: Bread wheat harvest index was 31.9% at 50% N and 31.5% at 100% N.

claims.evidence_text: grown in 6 row plots of 2.5 meter length with 20 cm row spacing.
claims.claim_summary: Bread wheat grown at 20 cm row spacing.
